question: Which of the following statements is true about the subset selection methods?

answers.answer: For Best Subset Selection you have to test $2^p$ models.
Backward Stepwise Selection is preferred over Forward Stepwise Selection when p>n.
A model with all potential predictors will always have the smallest RSS/largest $R^2$, since the quantities are related to the training error.
Backward Stepwise Selection starts with a Full Model
